---
title: "Solution 4E — select_best under different metrics (imbalanced microbiome)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidymodels))
library(dplyr)
source("_load_microbiome.R")
```

```{r imb-data}
set.seed(4)
mic <- load_microbiome()
otu_cols <- mic_otu_cols(mic)

mic_imb <- mic |>
  group_by(Label) |>
  filter(Label == "Early" | (Label == "Late" & row_number() <= max(1L, round(0.10 * sum(Label == "Late"))))) |>
  ungroup()

rec <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = mic_imb) |>
  update_role(sample_id, Individual, Sex, Day, new_role = "id") |>
  step_mutate(across(all_of(otu_cols), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

spec <- boost_tree(trees = tune(), tree_depth = tune(), learn_rate = 0.08) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |> set_mode("classification")

wf <- workflow() |> add_recipe(rec) |> add_model(spec)
folds <- mic_group_folds(mic_imb, v = 5)
grid <- expand.grid(trees = c(50, 100), tree_depth = c(2, 4))
metrics_multi <- metric_set(accuracy, pr_auc, mn_log_loss, f_meas)
```

```{r tune}
set.seed(8)
tune_res <- tune_grid(wf, resamples = folds, grid = grid, metrics = metrics_multi)

best_acc <- select_best(tune_res, metric = "accuracy")
best_pr <- select_best(tune_res, metric = "pr_auc")

bind_rows(
  best_acc |> mutate(selected_by = "accuracy"),
  best_pr |> mutate(selected_by = "pr_auc")
) |>
  select(selected_by, trees, tree_depth)
```

**Reporting:** For screening a rare `Late` community state, report **PR-AUC** and sensitivity; for a methods comparison where classes are balanced by design, accuracy may suffice — but never hide poor rare-class performance behind a high accuracy headline.

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
